title: Silver Foil K-Pop Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Silver Foil Kpop Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Subject: fictional adult K-pop editorial model with long espresso hair, dewy skin and sleeveless high-neck outfit appears as a fictional adult K-pop editorial model with long espresso hair, dewy glass skin, doll-like polished styling, metallic high-neck outfit, subtle silver jewelry, and calm direct camera presence. Scene: futuristic room made of crumpled silver foil, eye-level seated pose, cool reflections creates a futuristic room built from crumpled silver metallic foil, surrounding the subject with cool distorted reflections and sculptural texture. Composition: Fixed eye-level vertical portrait: subject seated or kneeling, arms crossed loosely at the waist, facing the camera, right hand resting on the left forearm, reflective high-neck dress catching the foil-room distortions, and the foil environment filling the frame. Signature Elements: All-silver crumpled foil room, seated/kneeling eye-level pose, arms crossed at waist, liquid metallic high-neck dress, distorted reflections on fabric, espresso waves, silver jewelry, and cool futuristic editorial mood. Style: High-quality photo/digital render with K-pop editorial polish, futuristic fashion magazine mood, dewy skin realism, liquid metallic fabric rendering, and surreal reflective room design. Color Palette: Dominant silver metallic foil, cool neutral shadows, dark espresso hair, pale skin highlights, soft pink lips, tiny silver jewelry, and controlled chrome reflections. Lighting: Artificial omnidirectional diffused light with soft high-contrast reflections, cool specular highlights, and gentle face illumination without harsh shadows. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Crumpled metallic foil walls, liquid reflective silver dress, high turtleneck collar, small silver earring, thin necklace pendant, glossy lips, dewy skin, and reflective fabric folds. Restrictions: Use a fictional adult model.
